CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE monthly_sales (empid INTEGER, dept TEXT, Jan INTEGER, Feb INTEGER, Mar INTEGER, Apr INTEGER, May INTEGER, Jun INTEGER);
SELECT * FROM (UNPIVOT (sales FOR month IN (Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun)) AS unpvt);
SELECT * FROM (UNPIVOT (sales FOR month IN (COLUMNS (* EXCLUDE (empid, dept))) AS unpvt);
WITH unpivot_alias AS (UNPIVOT (sales FOR month IN (Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun)) AS unpvt) SELECT * FROM unpivot_alias;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT dept, SUM(sales) AS total_sales FROM (UNPIVOT (sales FOR month IN (Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun)) AS unpvt) GROUP BY dept);
FROM monthly_sales UNPIVOT (sales FOR month IN (Jan, Feb, Mar));
FROM monthly_sales UNPIVOT (sales FOR month IN (COLUMNS (* EXCLUDE (empid, dept))));
FROM monthly_sales UNPIVOT ((month_1_sales, month_2_sales, month_3_sales) FOR quarter IN ((Jan, Feb, Mar) AS q1, (Apr, May, Jun) AS q2));
UNPIVOT (dataset ON COLUMNS(*) INTO NAME column_name VALUE value_column_name);
SELECT dept, month, sales FROM (SELECT empid, dept FROM monthly_sales WHERE dept = 'electronics') AS filtered UNPIVOT(sales FOR month IN (Jan, Feb, Mar));
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE test_sales (employee_id INTEGER, department TEXT, performance_1 INTEGER, performance_2 INTEGER, performance_3 INTEGER);
WITH sales_data AS (UNPIVOT (performance FOR performance_type IN (performance_1, performance_2, performance_3))) SELECT * FROM sales_data ORDER BY employee_id;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM monthly_sales WHERE empid = 1) AS emp_data UNPIVOT (sales FOR month IN (Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun));
FROM (SELECT empid, dept FROM monthly_sales WHERE dept = 'clothes') AS clothes_data UNPIVOT (sales FOR month IN (Jan, Feb, Mar));
